title: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur
short_info: Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Manager Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 5 years; Women: 10 years; Ex-Servicemen, Inter-caste marriage, etc. as per Chhattisgarh rules; Maximum age after relaxation not exceeding 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (10+2), Computer Diploma/Degree (1 year) from recognized institute
qualification.details: Higher Secondary (10+2) passed from recognized board. 1 year Computer Diploma/Degree from a recognized institute. Resident of the society area from a tendu leaf collector family with a minimum of 500 bundles collected in at least 3 years out of the last 5 years (2021-2025).

selection_process: Computer max 5) Document Verification Police Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: bilaspur.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Manager post is 20th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Manager position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Manager position is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary (10+2) from a recognized board and possess a 1-year Computer Diploma/Degree from a recognized institute. Additionally, they must be residents of the society area from a tendu leaf collector family.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes the creation of a Merit List based on marks in 10+2, Graduation, and Computer proficiency, followed by Document Verification, Police Verification, and a Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Manager post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Manager in the Primary Forest Produce Cooperative Society Bilaspur.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information and to download the application form is www.cghumfpfed.org.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The salary details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for salary information.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.
